svg.text: 1. Rectangular box, open top (lid closes). Material: PETG.
2. 4mm solid walls all sides, no ribs.
6. Pocket bore dia 9.8 (sliding fit for 9.31 center body,
7. Body ends (15.10 OD) protrude ~12mm each side of wall.
8. Release plate cavity: 63W x 51H x 6D behind pockets.
9. Guide pins: dia 3.0, 10mm deep, at X=40 & X=110.5, Z=40.
10. Cam lever pivot: dia 5 at X=74, Z=40 in front wall.
11. Bottom slide rails: 2x3mm x full 130mm depth.
12. 5mm x 45-deg chamfer on 4 front leading edges.
13. Interior ledges at Z=4 (2mm wide shelves) for pump tray.
14. Pogo PCB recess on top face: 15W x 30L x 1.5D mm.
15. Fitting pocket centers: X=54, X=94, Z=26, Z=54.
16. Detail A: barbell profile section at 6 px/mm.
Pump Cartridge Module — Soda Flavor Injector
